factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The accessory is shown being held, indicating a clear use moment.
The text highlights a specific benefit related to grip and ruggedness.
The layout is clear, with readable text and no distracting elements.
The image shows texture and construction details of the case.
The brand name is clearly visible, providing a credible trust signal.
Strong contrast and clear boundaries make the image easily readable.
